name: Redbook Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the last four and form into 60 meatballs.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the cranberry sauce, chili sauce, brown sugar, and lemon juice.
3. Pour the sauce over the meatballs.
4. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
